---
name: Bug report
about: Something in Inspira isn't behaving the way it should.
title: "[bug] "
labels: ["bug", "triage"]
assignees: []
---

Thanks for taking the time to report this. Clear detail here saves a lot of back-and-forth later.

## Describe the bug

A short, concrete summary of what went wrong. One or two sentences is plenty.

## Steps to reproduce

A numbered list of what you did, so someone else can walk the same path.

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What you thought would happen.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. If there was an error message, paste it verbatim inside a code block.

## Environment

- Browser and version (e.g. Chrome 124, Safari 17.4):
- Operating system (e.g. macOS 14.4, Windows 11):
- Inspira version or commit SHA:
- Backend: deployed hosted service / running locally
- If local, how you started the backend (docker-compose, `uvicorn`, other):

## Screenshots or screen recordings

Paste images or drop a short clip if the bug is visual or interactive. Redact anything sensitive.

## Additional context

Anything else worth mentioning — was this working yesterday, does it only happen with a specific topic, does it reproduce in an incognito window, etc.
